request_payload.exposure_text: As a former intelligence analyst with 20 years in strategic planning, I've seen firsthand how our reliance on foreign tech puts national security at risk. Strategic autonomy isn't just about being self-sufficient - it's about ensuring our critical infrastructure can't be held hostage. The recent cyber incidents at [Redacted] facilities prove we can't afford to wait. Every responsible citizen should support policies that strengthen our domestic capabilities. It's not about isolation - it's about having the tools to protect ourselves when alliances fall short. #NationalSecurityFirst #StrategicAutonomy
